items.name: 🖤「Midnight Crest Coat [PBR]」
items.description:
A timeless black coat with shining silver buttons, echoing the dignity of tradition and the edge of modern rebellion.
Whether you wear it as a symbol of discipline or as a statement of cool defiance, this coat will make you stand tall in style.
✨ Features
Sleek black fabric with PBR depth
Silver button details for contrast
Traditional cut with a modern vibe
Perfect for dramatic, cool avatars
🔍 Keywords: black coat, Japanese style, retro, formal, cool
